mapper.sql: u.id, u.username, u.password_hash, u.real_name, u.user_type, u.dept_id, d.dept_name, u.gender, u.phone, u.email, u.status, u.last_login_at, u.created_by, u.updated_by
mapper.select:
SELECT u.id, u.username, u.real_name, u.user_type, u.dept_id, d.dept_name, u.phone, u.email, u.status, u.last_login_at FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON d.id = u.dept_id AND d.deleted = 0 WHERE
ORDER BY u.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_user u WHERE

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.real_name, u.user_type, u.dept_id, d.dept_name, u.gender, u.phone, u.email, u.status, u.last_login_at FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON d.id = u.dept_id AND d.deleted = 0 WHERE u.id = #{id} AND u.deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON d.id = u.dept_id AND d.deleted = 0 WHERE u.id = #{id} AND u.deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON d.id = u.dept_id AND d.deleted = 0 WHERE u.username = #{username} AND u.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user ( username, password_hash, real_name, user_type, dept_id, phone, email, gender, status, created_by, updated_by, deleted, version ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{realName}, #{userType}, #{deptId}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{gender}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET real_name = #{realName}, user_type = #{userType}, dept_id = #{deptId}, gender = #{gender}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET deleted = 1, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET last_login_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT role_id FROM sys_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY role_id ASC
SELECT r.role_code FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.id ASC

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.real_name FROM sys_user u WHERE
ORDER BY u.id DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_user_role ( user_id, role_id, created_by, created_at ) VALUES
( #{userId}, #{roleId}, #{operatorId}, NOW() )
